designSystem.style: Bold geometric with matte deep emerald green, charcoal surfaces, and striking copper accents. Dynamic asymmetric grid layouts with diagonal lines suggesting financial ascent. Heavy weight typography (900) for key metrics, sharp card shapes with thick borders, no gradients except CTA and progress bars.

keyPatterns: Diagonal accent geometry on Home and Journey screens (rotated divs + SVG ascending polyline)
Asymmetric 60/40 metric split on Journey screen with large Ascent Score left, stacked micro-stats right
Featured Guild card with diagonal decorative block and bold white stats
Bottom tab navigation with elevated gradient Create button
Dark mode default with accessible theme toggle in header and profile settings
Copper accent (#c97a3e) used for active states, CTA gradients, streak counters
Emerald green (#28604a) for primary actions, progress fills, achievement highlights
